name: nexus-console
//: Pinning the rollup native binary for the CI runner (ubuntu x64-gnu) avoids the intermittent npm optional-dependency bug (npm/cli#4828) where `npm ci` on Linux drops the linux-x64 chunk even though it is required to load rollup. The full set of optional binaries is still resolved from rollup; this entry just guarantees the linux-x64 gnu one is present on lockfile so vite build works in CI.
